zh.lifeSummary: Robert Chandler De Oare於1390年出生。他和Jane Gitton至少有1個兒子。他去世於1424年享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert Chandler De Oare于1390年出生。他和Jane Gitton至少有1个儿子。他去世于1424年享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Chandler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name for a maker and seller of candles, from Anglo-Norman French chandeler ‘maker or seller of candles’ (Old French chandelier, Late Latin candelarius, a derivative of candela ‘candle’). While a medieval chandler no doubt made and sold other articles beside candles, the extended sense of modern English chandler does not occur until the 16th century. The name may also, more rarely, have denoted someone who was responsible for the lighting arrangements in a large house, or else one who owed rent in the form of wax or candles.

variants.name: Candler
meanings: English (East Anglia and southeastern England): variant of   Chandler  .
German: variant of Kandler and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Candler is very rare in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Oare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English ore ‘(river)bank’ (Old English ōra), or a habitational name from any of several places (in Kent, Berkshire, Wiltshire, and Somerset) named with this word.

variants.name: Ore
meanings: habitational name from Woore (Shropshire). The placename derives from Old English wæfre ‘unstable, wavering’ or wæfer ‘that which wanders or wavers’; the local topographic significance of this term is unclear.

variants.name: Nowers
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Noyers in Eure, France.

topographic name from the Middle English prepositional phrase atten ore, atte nore ‘at the riverbank or hillside’, or a habitational name from a place called with this phrase, such as Nore Hill in Eartham (Sussex), Nower Wood in Headley (Surrey), Nore Farm in Bramley (Surrey), or Nower Hill in Pinner (Middlesex). Compare Oare .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Robert Chandler De Oare was born in 1390. He had at least 1 son with Jane Gitton. He died in 1424, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert Chandler De Oare est né en 1390. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Jane Gitton. Il est décédé en 1424, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Robert Chandler De Oare wurde 1390 geboren. Er hatte mit Jane Gitton mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1424 im Alter von 34 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Robert Chandler De Oare è nato il nel 1390. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Jane Gitton. Morì nel 1424, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Chandler De Oareは1390年に生まれた。彼はJane Gittonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1424年に34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Chandler De Oare(은)는 1390년 태어났다. 그는 Jane Gitton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1424년 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert Chandler De Oare nasceu em 1390. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Jane Gitton. Ele faleceu em 1424, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert Chandler De Oare родился в 1390 г. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Jane Gitton. Он умер в 1424 г. в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Robert Chandler De Oare nació en 1390. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Jane Gitton. Murió en 1424, a la edad de 34 años.
